panel.title: Recommendations inbox
panel.intro: Operational recommendations calculated inside the app from your time logs and incidents.

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.subtitle: They remain pending until you review or dismiss them.

empty.title: All reviewed
empty.description: You have no pending recommendations. When a new one appears, it will be highlighted in red again.

overview.title: Operational recommendations
overview.subtitle: Automatic suggestions generated with internal rules based on your time logs.

fallback.inactiveHeadline: Sign in to activate the assistant.
fallback.inactiveSummary: The assistant uses internal rules to generate workday recommendations.
fallback.noPendingSummary: When a useful new suggestion appears, it will be marked here as pending.

missingCheckin.title: There are no check-ins today yet.
missingCheckin.message: Start your day in check-ins and the assistant will calculate your optimal end time.

suggestedEnd.titleExceeded: You are already above your target day.
suggestedEnd.titleAligned: You already have a recommended end time.
suggestedEnd.messageExceeded: If you stop now or reduce tomorrow, you avoid building up more excess. Your reference closing time was already {{time}}.
suggestedEnd.messageAligned: If you keep this pace, leaving at {{time}} keeps you aligned with your daily target.

suggestedStart.titlePositive: Tomorrow you can compensate by starting later.
suggestedStart.titleNegative: It would be good to adjust tomorrow's start time.
suggestedStart.messagePositive: You ended today with extra time. If you start tomorrow at {{time}}, you recover part of the balance.
suggestedStart.messageNegative: You ended today below target. If you start tomorrow at {{time}}, you reduce the weekly drag.

breakReminder.title: A short break would help now.
breakReminder.message: You have been working continuously for {{duration}}. A short break would help.

weeklyBalance.messagePositive: You have accumulated {{duration}} extra compared to the expected pace. You can ease it by starting tomorrow at {{time}}.
weeklyBalance.messageNegative: You are {{duration}} below the expected pace. Adjust tomorrow so the end of the week does not get overloaded.

incidentsPending.title: You have {{count}} pending incidents.
incidentsPending.message: This notice requires operational review so it does not remain pending.

balancedDay.title: Your day is balanced.
balancedDay.message: No intervention is needed right now. The assistant stays quiet when there is no useful action to suggest.
